name: Beef Soup with Liver Balls[dumplings]
recipeIngredient: 2 Pounds Short Ribs or Chuck Bone (1 to 4 pieces)
recipeInstructions:
SOUP: Wash the meat; place in a large pot. Add onions and celery (including tops), salt, pepper, and water. Cover and bring to a boil. Skim off any scum that forms. Reduce heat so the meat just simmers. Cook for 1 1/2 hours. Add carrots, tomatoes, and parsley; cook for another hour or until the meat is tender.
Meanwhile, make the liver balls: Combine the liver with bread crumbs, flour, eggs, parsley, salt, pepper, marjoram, mace, and garlic. Let it stand until the soup is done. Then shape into balls about the size of golf balls. Remove the tender meat, bone, and carrots from the soup; cut the meat and carrots into bite-sized pieces. Return them to the soup. Bring the soup to a boil and drop in the liver balls. Cover and cook for 10 minutes.
Serve.
